message:
refactor(extensions): PiJsRuntime rename in benchmarks, CancelGuard hoist, doc header fix

benches/extensions.rs:
- Update bench_js_runtime to use PiJsRuntime (renamed from
  QuickJsRuntime) and drain_microtasks() (renamed from
  run_pending_jobs()) matching the runtime API refactor

src/extension_dispatcher.rs:
- Hoist CancelGuard struct definition above the spawn block where
  it's referenced, improving code locality. The guard was previously
  defined after the spawn but before its use — now it's defined
  before both, making the control flow clearer.

src/extensions_js.rs:
- Update module doc header from "runtime scaffolding" to "runtime
  bridge" to reflect that the QuickJS runtime struct has been
  extracted to its own module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
